query: extreme overexposure blown out highlights white sky photograph
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: exposure extremes — overexposed/blown highlights, silhouettes against white sky, washed-out high-key minimalism

response.objective_caption: A tall vertical view showing a bright sky above a strip of blue water at the bottom, with a small multicolored kite near the top edge and a tiny dark figure suspended beneath it.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A tall vertical view depicting a multicolored kite and a human figure rendered at an extreme, miniaturized scale near the top of the frame, overwhelmed by a vast expanse of bright sky with a narrow strip of textured blue water at the bottom edge, creating a minimal composition where the subjects are reduced to near-abstract proportions.
